functions.name: CONTROL_DEVICE
functions.description: Turn a smart home device on or off.

value_descriptions.lights: lights lamp bulb ceiling too dark dim room gloomy cannot see pitch black need light visibility poor
value_descriptions.fan: fan spinning cold draft blowing chilly freezing from fan too hot stuffy need air circulation ventilation ceiling fan noise bothering humming
value_descriptions.tv: tv screen television watching show movie playing display telly program entertainment something to watch picture on
value_descriptions.ac: air conditioning temperature too high sweating hot room humid heat uncomfortable climate too warm need cooling air conditioner hvac
value_descriptions.heater: heater radiator space heater freezing cold warming up chilly winter temperature dropping frost

value_descriptions.living_room: living room sofa couch lounging watching tv guests family gathering common area relaxing sitting area lounge
value_descriptions.bedroom: bedroom sleeping going to bed waking up tired resting napping night time morning can't sleep tossing turning
value_descriptions.kitchen: kitchen cooking meal making food preparing breakfast eating smell of food stovetop dishes culinary
value_descriptions.office: office working at desk studying concentration laptop open reading writing calls meetings focus homework
value_descriptions.bathroom: bathroom shower tub toilet washing face brushing teeth getting ready washroom

value_descriptions.on: turn on switch on start activate enable launch open power on — too dark too hot stuffy need it want it need heat required feels uncomfortable
value_descriptions.off: turn off switch off shut down stop disable kill deactivate close shut off end — too bright glare hurting eyes too loud annoying drafty going to sleep done with it quiet please stop not needed

functions.name: PLAY_MUSIC
functions.description: Play music of a specific genre in a room.

value_descriptions.jazz: jazz smooth mellow relaxing evening chill lounge sophisticated background vibe saxophone trumpet cool
value_descriptions.pop: pop upbeat cheerful catchy sing along dance party fun energetic mainstream radio hits
value_descriptions.rock: rock loud energetic pumped up electric guitar bold headbanging intense driving workout anthem
value_descriptions.classical: classical calm peaceful study focus elegant reading concentration symphony orchestra refined soothing piano
value_descriptions.lofi: lofi beats hip hop study relaxing background ambient chill chillhop deep focus background music

value_descriptions.living_room: living room sofa couch lounge guests relaxing watching
value_descriptions.bedroom: bedroom sleeping resting waking up night morning

functions.name: SET_TIMER
functions.description: Set a countdown timer for a number of minutes.

duration.description: Minutes. Extract from: '10 minutes', '2 hours'=120, '30 seconds'=0.5

functions.name: CONTROL_DOOR_LOCK
functions.description: Lock or unlock a specific door in the house.

value_descriptions.front_door: front door main entrance entry way front porch street door
value_descriptions.back_door: back door patio door rear entrance backyard door deck
value_descriptions.garage: garage door car port side door auto garage driveway driveway with my car coming home from driving

value_descriptions.locked: lock secure bolt close ensure safety lock it up going out sleeping leaving house
value_descriptions.unlocked: unlock open unlatch let someone in coming home open the door expecting guests

functions.name: SET_TEMPERATURE
functions.description: Set the thermostat to a specific temperature.

value_descriptions.entire_house: whole house everywhere all rooms thermostat central heating hvac system

temperature.description: Degrees. Extract from: '72 degrees', 'set to 68', '22 celsius'

functions.name: CONTROL_BLINDS
functions.description: Open or close the window blinds or shades.

value_descriptions.open: open raise let light in sunlight morning bright outside want to see outside uncover windows
value_descriptions.closed: close shut lower too bright glare privacy nighttime dark out block out the sun
